title: Kaya’s Mansion Draws the Crew In
description: On pages 10–13, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What kind of strong points are those?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So the lady is feeling better already?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Yeah, and it's all thanks to the captain!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then we shall go to the mansion and ask for a ship!!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: No!! Didn't you just say you'd give it up?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Then what's the use of that greeting?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: since we can't stop him, we'll have to follow him

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Trespass- ERS? Where are the guards?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Well...... they just went out for lunch.....!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Hahahaha... so what HAP- penned to the Goldfish?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Well then I sliced it up into little pieces, and sent them to the country of the dwarves...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And up to this day they still haven't been able to finish eating it. Then, because of my great powers, they all called me...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: These guys heard of my repita- lion, and travelled far to see me here

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: They are the new members of the USOPP? Pirate group!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You can't just barge into the mansion like this!!

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
